para_trans: To disburse funds for construction of Training Centre and Auditorium at Goods and Services Tax Bhawan, Wadala, Mumbai.
Government Decision No: VICTORY-9026 / P.No.58 / E.No.97091251 / V.P.4
Read: - 1. Department of Finance, Government Decision No. January 23, 2025.
Department of Finance, Government Decision No. 1025 / Q. 32 / V.P. 4, D. March 21, 2025 3, Department of Finance, Government Circular No. April 9, 2026.

The training centre and auditorium at Goods and Services Tax Bhawan, ASAT, FAS were constructed by the Maharashtra State Road Development Corporation at a cost of Rs. A grant of 199,97,59, 000 / - (Rupees One Hundred and Ninety-Nine Crore CATV Lakh Sixty-Nine Thousand only) has been sanctioned to meet the expenditure for this financial year 2026-27. 60 per cent of the budgeted amount of Rs. The Government hereby approves the disbursement of funds to the tune of ₹1,000 / -crore (Rupees One Hundred and Nineteen Crore Ninety-eight Lakh Fifty-Five Thousand only).

2. While spending the said fund, the Financial Rules in the Maharashtra Budget Manual, Financial Authority Manual as well as the No. 3 The directions given in the government circular here should be strictly followed. Compliance with these terms / conditions shall be the responsibility of the Commissioner of State Taxes, Goods and Services Tax Department, State of Maharashtra.

3. Expenditure "Demand No. G-8, Chief Accountant 4059-Capital Expenditure on Public Works, 01-Office Buildings, 051-Construction, 00, (00) (01) Construction (Programme) of Sales Tax Office Buildings by Maharashtra State Road Development Corporation (4059 3252) 53- Major Constructions "to be sub-divided from the grant sanctioned in this financial year 2026-27.

4. Report of expenditure incurred from the said provision made available, information on material objective achieved by head of account / head of account, certificate of utilization of funds, etc., to the Government from time to time.
This Government Decision is an informal reference to the Expenditure-7 Executive of the Department of Finance.
No. 449/2026 Expenditure-7, D. Is being issued as agreed under 22.06.2026.
D. This Government decision is available on the website of the Government of Maharashtra www.maharashtra.gov.in
